headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片本周寥寥
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Trending, Few New Films This Week
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅两部新片。《痴迷》《鬼上车》等占据热搜，多部续集与动画预定未来档期。
summaryEn: No movies released today, only 2 new this week. 'Obsession', 'Ghost Bus' top trends; sequels and animations lined up.

industryHighlights.text: 本周仅2部新片上映，市场冷淡
industryHighlights.en: Only 2 new releases this week, slow market

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》位列本周热搜第二
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 ranks 2nd in weekly trending

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》《海洋奇缘：启航》等多部续集定档
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5, Moana: Voyage among sequels scheduled
Spider-Man: Fresh New Day highly anticipated
